use_cases: Displaying status indicators on data tables and cards
Showing category labels or tags with semantic colors
Indicating notification counts or alert states
Visual distinction between different item types in lists
Providing disabled state feedback on interactive elements
ai_summary: A versatile badge/status indicator component with multiple semantic variants (primary, secondary, success, warning, info, destructive, outline) and appearance styles (default, light, ghost). Features three sizes (lg, md, sm), disabled state handling, and Radix Slot primitive for composition. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling across variants, following shadcn/ui patterns.
